name: MAN AHL DIVERSIFIED I LP
summary: Man-AHL Diversified I L.P. is a Delaware limited partnership that engages in speculative trading of physical commodities, futures contracts, spot and forward contracts, swaps, options, and other financial derivatives on domestic and international exchanges. It operates as a feeder fund investing substantially all assets in Man AHL-Diversified Trading Company L.P., trading globally across currencies, bonds, energies, stock indices, interest rates, metals, agricultural, and volatility sectors using a systematic, quantitative investment strategy.

products.name: Class A Units
products.description: General offer limited partnership units in the Partnership.

products.name: Class B Units
products.description: Limited partnership units offered to employee benefit plans, IRAs, and retirement accounts with $10,000 minimum.

products.name: Class A Series 2 Units
products.description: Series 2 limited partnership units added April 1, 2009 with different fee structure.

products.name: AHL Diversified Program
products.description: Systematic, quantitative trading program trading global futures, forwards, swaps, and derivatives across multiple sectors.
